Two unidentified students wearing graduation robes during the 1976 Commencement.  May 18, 1976.
Students sit on the roof of the bookstore while others stand below. Herrick Chapel is in the background.
Woman sits on the backrest of a wooden folding chair with seated crowd in background. Commencement 1977.
Crowd of seated onlookers at Commencement 1977.
The photograph shows Claudia Beckwith (Class of 1977) during the 1977 Commencement, wearing a decorative graduation cap with a flower.
A student adjusts her decorated graduation cap at the 1977 Commencement.
A student and parents moving into the dormitories on New Student Day.
The photograph shows Vance Liebman (Class of 1974) in the college bookstore as students line up among stacks of textbooks during the begining of the academic term.
Two pairs of students are engaged in conversation outside the Forum.

Two men load crates into a truck bed while students converse behind them. The indivisual is Bo Batty. Bo Batty at Texaco service station in Grinnell, standing beside a pickup truck while workers load or unload things outside the station.
Two students sit on the floor looking at papers while others stand nearby.
The photograph shows Maria Perotto (Class of 1974) speaking with staff and students at a registration desk during course registration.
Student getting on a bike outside the Forum.
Six students sits at a table engaged in writing work.
Jon Herman (Class of 1978) is standing near the center-right of the photograph during course registration.
Students sit in a classroom with combined desk chairs. The student on the right is Warren Rubstello.
Beth Loup Liebman is standing on the right side of the photograph, browsing items on a bookstore shelf.
Student on the right is Melanie Steinkraus. The woman on the left is unidentified. The photograph documents a vaccination being administered on campus, 1972.
The photograph shows Julie Hollings browsing books in the campus bookstore.
Two graduates pose together outdoors during commencement ceremonies. Laura Ohline is standing on the left. Jean Dettweiler, Class of 1985, is standing on the right.
Lotonia Marshall and her baby Robert Jr. at the 1986 Commencement ceremony.
Two people pose for the camera at the 1986 Commencement.

A student, possibly identified as McKeown, sits cross-legged on the floor reading printed material in a lounge or common area. The student is positioned as the center of the photograph, with a piano and seating visible in the background, 1982.

Two students sit together on cushioned seating in a campus lounge or common area. One student appears to be reading while speaking with another. One of the student is possibly Serena, though the identification remains uncertain, 1982.

A student identified as Kayla Haines sits reading beneath a large tree on the Grinnell College campus, with a residence hall visible in the background. Kayla Haines is seated in the lower center-right portion of the photograph at the base of the tree, 1982.

Two students identified as Rhoda Mailna and Lisa Clearlite are shown in a workshop or classroom setting speaking with an older woman who is opearting equipment in the foreground. Rhonda Malina stands on the left side of the photograph, while Lisa Clearlite stands near the center of the image facing the camera. The unidentified woman is positioned in the foreground with her back to the camera, 1982.
Student browsing in bookstore, 1982.

Students browse and converse among bookshelves in the campus bookstore Susan Rest Asplund is positioned near the center of the photograph, standing in front of a display of books. Two additional unidentified individuals are visble at the left and right sides of the image, 1982.
Two students chatting at table, 1982.

Gali Burdick is seated at her desk in an office. Positioned at the center of the photograph, she is shown smiling toward the camera, with office materials and a bulletin board visble in the background, 1982.
Student at registration on New Student Day, 1982.
Two women embrace, 1986.
Graduates and guests gather outdoors following Commencement ceremony. Idenfied individuals include Nancy Lambert and Rhonda Stuart. Lianne Kimura and Perry Stern are tentatively identified.
Close up of one student blowing bubbles with second in background, 1986.

Students attend the 1986 Commencement ceremony. Jim Arbogast is standing on the left side of the photograph. Ethan Cohen, James Rayo, and Klydah are standing near the center of group. Mary Batson is standing near the center-right of the photograph. Cristy Costello is standing to the right of Mary Batso.Mike Bianchi is standing on the right side of the photograph.
Three students review a document outdoors. From left to right, the students are Anya Grundman, Jackson Wilson, and Jessica Thebus, 1985.

These graduates pose together outdoors during Commencement ceromonies. Phil LeClerc is standing on the left, an unidentified female graduate is standing in the center holding a bouquet of flowers, and Dave Wilson is standing on the right, 1987.
Kate Worcester in a crowd of other students in Graduation robes, wearing a fedora and staring into the distance, 1985.

Student participating in an international gathering pose on steps beneath a Republic of China flag. Danny McGrath is seated on the far left side of the photograph. In the front row, Sanjeev Pandey is standing left of the center, Simon Huang is standing near the center, Omar is standing right of center, and Bomi Mistry is standing on the far right. Doug White is visible in the background on the right side of the photograph, 1984.

Five students pose together in a residence hall room. Bomi Mistry is standing on the far left of the group. Kayla Haines is also pictured, though her exact position within the group has not been identified, 1984.

Members of the Grinnell College Dance Troupe rehearse for a concert held March 9-10, 1984. Mariam Puldas appears at the front left of the formation. Althea Ricketts is positioned in the upper right area of the group. Emelina Tedesco appears near the center-right. Lisa Cohen is crouched in the foreground at right.

Members of the Grinnell Singers pose for a group portrait in Herrick Chapel, 1984. Identified individuals include Susan Meazkoff, Tim Black, Thom Barthlemess, Ruth Schmidt, and Claire Vernette in the back row (left to right); Ross Carson in the second row from the back; Michelle Maly in the second row on the left; Andy Paul McLary on the far left side of the group; Carol Flesher (Class of 1985) on the right side; Dave Piston in the upper right; Annette Aluzas in the front row; and Tushar Khinder in the lower right. Janet Seger (1985), seated near the center, is tentatively identified.
A group of students pick up mail from home at the book store mailroom, 1956.
A group of unidentified students dance in pairs at a house party, 1955.

A scene from the Boar's Head dinner - a student dressed as a gladiator duels with a student dressed as a monster(?) A student dressed as an old man cowers next to a table in the middle between them.
Two students on the far left stand next to a big cut-out of a man, one student poses crouched underneath the cutot as another student holds her hand.

A group of students in striped shirts and with a can on a string tied around their necks talk with their hands out in front of them, as some other students watch. Around then, students converse and hold signs.

Two students, pose at Arbor Lake in front of a wooden building. One student leans against a tree while the other props themselves up on the tree, their arm outstretched next to the tree-leaning student.

column2: Five students in a drama production, 1955
column18: Five students perform in a theater production, one on all fours in armor looks up at a student wearing a big robe. Three other students wearing togas hold paddles and look down and the student on all fours.

column2: Two students at an all-campus picnic, 1955
column18: Two students sit on the grass at an All Student Picnic, eating off of paper plates. Behind them are other students in groups.
Students in nice outfits (dresses, suits) and nametags stand around a table and get refreshments, little snacks and punch, from two women sitting and ladling it out.

Six students rehearse for a theatre production. Two sit on the ground, in a protective stance, flanking a central figure who appears menacing. Three stand behind in contrapposto, with the right arms up behind them. A seventh figure stands to the side, watching with a towel wrapped around their neck.

column2: Two students play checkers at a round table, 1956
column18: Two students sit at a round table across from each other, playing checkers. They rest their chins in their hands, looking down at the board seriously

column2: Seniors prepare to leave for annual class picnic in college station wagons, 1956
column18: A group of students stands inside and between two parked station wagons - two sit in the trunk of the left one, five students stand and talk between, and one sits in the back row of the right one while the last one stands next to them, back turned to camera.

Six individuals stand in the middle of the street on some sort of stadium, with a microphone in front of them. Two of them are eating pie as another person holds the pie. A man in a hat watches. People on the roof of the building behind the scene also watch.
Student on the right is Omar Ghaffar (Class of 1998), undated but likely 1994.

Student seated on the couch second from the right is Max Maclay (Class of 1997). Student seated on the couch on the far left is Brian Rebel (Class of 1998). Student seated on the floor in the foreground wearing a black cap is unidentified. Student seated on the floor facing left may be Laura (Class of 1997). Other students in the photograph are unidentified.
Four students playing music in central campus, 1994.

Four students stand outfoors on campus participating in what appears to be a watermelon-eating competition or student activity. The student on the far left is Matthew Welch (Class of 1996). The second student from the left is Roy Rich (Class of 1996). The third student from the left is an unidentified student. The student on the far right is Greg Kane (Class of 1996). This picture was taken outside of Cowles, 1993.

Farmers Market. Student in the center is Indrani Lahiri (Class of 2000). Student on the right is Laya Ranjit (Class of 2000). The person on the left is unidentified, likely 1994.

Downtown Grinnell. Student on the left is John Haller (Class of 1995). Student on the right is unidentified, 1994.

Four students sit on chairs near a window, chatting, 1969. Taken for the new student catalogue "When You Come to Grinnell" Professor Greg Guroff is seated on the far left side of the photograph, sitting in a sofa crossed and facing the group discussion. The second from the right is H. Christine Midelfort..

A large crowd watches a game from the stands, people in the first row hold a sign that says "Young Steve". Bruce Strom is seated in the fifth row from the front and approximately the fifth person from the left side of the photograph, among the spectators in the bleachers. Ron Ai (Class of 1970) is seated in the front row, approximately the sixth person from the left side of the photograph, near the bottom center-right area of the image. Mike Sehested (Class of 1970) is seated in the upper middle-right section of the photograph. He wears his glasses and is positioned several rows behind the front of the crowd. H. Tappes appears along the right side of photograph, seated among the spectators in the stands,  Fall 1966.

Gathering of students in the South Campus Loggia. Al Wands is seated on the left side of the photograph, reclining in a cushioned lounge chair with his legs extended onto another chair in front of him.

Senate meets during the 1965-66 school year. Seated in middle row center is Terry Nelson Littlejohn. Art Knowles (Class of 1970) appears near the center-right of the photograph and is partially obscured by the annotation note identifying him. He is seated among a group of students holding papers and appears to be participating  in Senate meeting.

She appears between two standing figures in the foreground, with only the upper portion of her body visible.

A group of students register for classes in Darby. Dan Duncan (Class of 1974) is standinng near the center-right of the photograph. He is wearing a patterned coat and holding a sheet of paper in his right hand while facing the registration table.
